root_cause: rate limiter misconfigured to apply global limits instead of per-user limits
resolution: rollback rate limiter configuration and restore per-user limits

root_cause: missing database index causing full table scans under load
resolution: added appropriate index and optimized slow queries

root_cause: JWT signing key rotated without updating all services
resolution: synchronized JWT keys across services and redeployed auth service

symptoms: orders created but inventory not updated
root_cause: consumer service crashed due to unhandled exception
resolution: fixed exception handling and restarted consumer service

root_cause: cache invalidation logic failed after deployment
resolution: fixed cache invalidation and flushed stale cache entries

root_cause: memory leak in request handling logic
resolution: fixed memory leak and deployed patched version

root_cause: connection pool size too small for increased traffic
resolution: increased connection pool size and optimized usage

root_cause: search indexing pipeline stalled due to backlog
resolution: cleared backlog and scaled indexing workers

root_cause: health check endpoint failing due to dependency timeout
resolution: fixed health check logic and increased timeout threshold

root_cause: misconfigured environment variable for auth service
resolution: corrected environment configuration and restarted service
